entries.title: The Shield-Wall Sampler
entries.description: A sturdy platter of smoked cheeses and hard tack crackers. Perfect for blocking hunger until the real fight begins.

entries.title: Boar-Slayer’s Bacon Knots
entries.description: Crispy, thick-cut pork glazed in forest honey. We promise we caught the boar ourselves (mostly).

entries.title: Ragnar’s 'Mistake' Stew
entries.description: A thick root vegetable soup that was supposed to be a sauce. It’s surprisingly good if you don't ask what the 'crunchy bit' is.

main_courses.title: The Great Axe Rib
main_courses.description: A single, massive beef rib that looks like it was carved by a giant. Comes with a side of 'victory potatoes'.

main_courses.title: Valhalla’s Roast Bird
main_courses.description: A whole roasted chicken basted in herbs and butter. Guaranteed to make you feel like you've already made it to the afterlife.

main_courses.title: Longboat Salmon
main_courses.description: Freshly caught fish seared over an open flame. It’s served on a wooden plank because plates are for the weak.

main_courses.title: The Berserker’s Bowl
main_courses.description: A mountain of venison meatballs and heavy cream sauce. Eat this only if you plan on sleeping for three days straight.

desserts.title: Loki’s Lemon Tarts
desserts.description: Small, zesty pastries that are sweet at first but pack a sour punch. Just like the god of mischief himself.

desserts.title: Yggdrasil Apple Crumble
desserts.description: Baked apples topped with oats and cinnamon. It’s the 'Tree of Life' in a bowl, or at least a very tasty branch.

desserts.title: Fjord Frost Cream
desserts.description: Cold, whipped cream topped with wild mountain berries. It’s the only thing in this tavern colder than a winter raid.

beverages.title: Thunder Scar Homebrew
beverages.description: Our signature mead, aged in charred barrels for a smoky, electrifying finish. One sip and you’ll feel the lightning in your veins!

beverages.title: The Drunken Skald’s Ale
beverages.description: A light, crisp blonde ale that makes even the worst singing sound like a masterpiece.

beverages.title: Mountain Goat Milk
beverages.description: For the designated chariot drivers. It’s thick, creamy, and definitely didn't come from a cow.

beverages.title: Odin’s Eye Coffee
beverages.description: Dark, bitter brew that will keep you awake through the longest winter nights.
